title: Egghead Falls Under Siege
description: On pages 10–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Vegapunk, Luffy, Sanji, Unknown person #11, Edison as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: His memories are here, aren't they?

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: Egghead Labo- Stratum

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What?! Rob Lucci...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...Really made it all the way up here?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: My apologies, the system malfunctioned!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a good thing zero and brook stayed on the ship!! There's no way they'd lose!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if it's two against three, they'll figure something out!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: No, look again.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Battle is far more lopsided than you think.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: What?!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Those Seraphim things are there too?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's two against seven now, and they're up against the best of the best!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: DAMIN IT!! They called in back up while the barrier was down?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: ...No, I doubt CPO ordered them directly.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The Seraphim are able to assess combat situations...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And they're equipped with some limited decision making capability of their own.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So they chose to capitalize on the barrier going down?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We didn't order them to come.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's not like we can make them go back now, the dome is operational again!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The enemy's made a serious miscalculation....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now that they're up here, we can turn the Seraphim back to our side...

dialogue.speaker: Edison
dialogue.text: ...Since we're higher in the command hierarchy!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's assumin' we get there in time to holler our orders at 'em! till then, they're still a huge threat!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Ah'll be back lickety- split!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hopefully those two can hang in there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: wood! I'll go too! Hehe!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll leave it to you two then... Edison, Lilth!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Get off your high horse!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 10 think moss-head would croak right when the one piece is in our sights...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You go too! This threat affects the whole crew!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nami's orders are absolute for the me-Raphim:)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Still, why do I have to save him?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Don't screw around, Swirlaphim! This is serious!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What the devil is he supposed to be?!

dialogue.speaker: Kaku
dialogue.text: Well, he's meant to be a giraffe.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But he seems a little different from what I remember...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not that it matters... he's gonna wind up a diced up corpse either way.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: That's if you can cut me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: RORDOA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Look after the ship, brook!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Under- stood!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Nose Gun...

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 42 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
